name: phpMyAdmin
tagline: PhpMyAdmin is the most popular web interface for MySQL & MariaDB. Simply install PhpMyAdmin and then select what database you want to connect to. Enter your P
description:
PhpMyAdmin is the most popular web interface for MySQL & MariaDB. Simply install PhpMyAdmin and then select what database you want to connect to. Enter your P


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  phpmyadmin:
    image: phpmyadmin/phpmyadmin:5.0.2
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      PMA_ARBITRARY: '1'
      UPLOAD_LIMIT: 2M
    ports:
      - 42097:80
